ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
MACOSX_SDK_VERSION:
- '11.0'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
qt:
- '5'
qt6_main:
- '6.10'
qt_main:
- '5.15'
target_platform:
- linux-64
name: pivy
raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: pivy
  version: "0.6.11"

package:
  name: ${{ name }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/coin3d/${{ name }}/archive/refs/tags/${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 78f79bd7d1ce7e8140ceba4b1220136ea1f14b4403b1e463c59fa892feed961e
  patches:
    - patches/windows_cmake_install_path_fix.patch

build:
  number: 0
  string: py${{ python | version_to_buildstring }}qt${{ qt }}h${{ hash }}_${{ build_number }}
  skip: ${{ match(python, ">3.11") and (qt == "5") }}
  script:
    env:
      USE_QT6: ${{ "1" if qt == "6" else "0" }}

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - ${{ compiler("cxx") }}
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: python
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
    - if: win
      then: msinttypes
    - cmake
    - ninja
    - swig
  host:
    - python
    - coin3d
    - if: qt == "6"
      then:
        - qt6-main
        - soqt6
    - if: qt == "5"
      then:
        - qt-main
        - soqt
    - if: linux
      then: libgl-devel
  run:
    - python

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - pivy.coin
        - pivy.gui.soqt
      pip_check: false

about:
  license: ISC
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: python bindings to coin3d.
  homepage: https://github.com/FreeCAD/pivy
  repository: https://github.com/FreeCAD/pivy
  documentation: https://github.com/FreeCAD/pivy

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - looooo
